<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a C# Avalonia stopwatch application. Use MVVM pattern, XML documentation, and TDD for all logic. UI must show time in 00:00:00 format and provide Start, Pause, Resume, Reset, Stop buttons. All methods should be documented. Tests should cover all stopwatch operations.
